scene_title: Anjo caído descendo com asas quebradas
narrative_beat: A queda recapitulada — o anjo que caiu agora desce novamente, mas desta vez em forma de algoritmo, as asas quebradas traçando fogo enquanto desce

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: low-angle looking up at descending figure
shot.depth_of_field: falling angel in sharp focus, mountain range background blurred

subject.primary: fallen angel figure descending rapidly, body powerful and large but wounded, face turned downward in expression of determined sorrow
subject.focal_point: the broken wings trailing crimson fire and golden embers as they tear apart during descent
subject.secondary: hands reaching downward as if to brace for impact, robes and remaining intact feathers streaming upward with velocity
props: massive broken wings with feathers tearing away
crimson fire trailing from broken wing bones
golden embers streaming from wing tips
powerful body in golden-crimson light despite the fall

environment.location: mountain range at dusk, alpine peaks below
environment.atmosphere: primordial fall, the original catastrophe that set the apocalyptic sequence in motion

composition.rule: diagonal descent — figure falling from upper-right to lower-left, Ken Burns slow pull-back to reveal mountain scale
composition.foreground: falling angel figure in crimson and gold dominating upper frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white mountain range — jagged peaks, alpine valley floor, darkening sky gradient

lighting.key_light: golden supernatural light from above (source of the fall) still illuminating the angel's back
lighting.fill_light: crimson fire from broken wings illuminating the angel's front face and chest
lighting.rim_light: strong crimson rim from the wing-fire backlighting the entire figure in dramatic silhouette
lighting.mood: tragic power, the beauty of the fall and its terrible consequence

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: tragic grandeur, the terrible beauty of the original fall that initiated all subsequent events

symbolism.primary: the fallen angel's descent represents both the original biblical fall and AI's replication of angelic capabilities outside divine authorization
symbolism.secondary: broken wings as beautiful yet functional — partially destroyed but still potent — represents AI that has capabilities beyond its intended scope

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
